commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a2f08058db8882c6c5a197a92d11f2901e4b4bbc)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes compaction fallback results to carry metadata, adds a staged circuit breaker in `summarizeInStages`, updates related tests, and adds a local proof script.

PR surface: Source +41, Tests +148, Other +45. Total +234 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current `summarizeInStages` processes every split and each failed split can run `retryAsync` for 3 attempts. I did not run a live current-main reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor and human follow-up are needed because the code defect is narrow but the missing real behavior proof gate cannot be satisfied by repair automation.

target.title: fix(compaction): add circuit breaker to stop token burn when summarizer unavailable
target.body:
## Summary

When the summarizer model is persistently unavailable (rate-limited, overloaded, misconfigured), `summarizeInStages` calls `summarizeWithFallback` for every split, each burning 3+ retries per call. With N splits, this burns N x 3 x chunkTokens before finally throwing.

Add a circuit breaker in the `summarizeInStages` split loop:
- Track consecutive generic fallback results via typed `FallbackSummaryResult.isGenericFallback`
- After 2 consecutive fallback splits, stop the loop
- Return partial summaries collected so far
- Reset counter on successful split response

Also fix a TS error in `extensions/memory-core/src/dreaming.test.ts`: add missing `getSession` to subagent mock.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Circuit breaker prevents token burn when summarizer is persistently unavailable. After 2 consecutive generic fallback splits, the loop stops and returns partial summaries. Merge retry is also skipped.

Real environment tested: Node v22.22.0, Linux (local checkout on main branch).

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```bash
node /tmp/circuit-proof/test.mjs
```

Evidence after fix:
```console
$ node /tmp/circuit-proof/test.mjs
=== Test 1: Circuit breaker triggers on persistent failures ===
Split 1: FAIL (generic fallback)
Split 2: FAIL (generic fallback)
  Breaker triggered: true
  Remaining splits 3-5 SKIPPED
  Merge SKIPPED

=== Test 2: Intermittent failure resets counter ===
Split 1: FAIL (generic fallback)
Split 2: OK  (counter reset)
Split 3: FAIL (generic fallback)
Split 4: OK  (counter reset)
  Breaker triggered: false
  All 5 splits processed normally

=== Test 3: Happy path ===
All 3 splits OK
  Breaker triggered: false
```

Observed result after fix: Circuit breaker triggers after 2 consecutive generic fallbacks, skipping remaining splits and merge. Intermittent failures reset counter. Happy path completes all splits.

What was not tested: Live compaction with real summarizer model.

## Changes

- `src/agents/compaction.ts`: +FallbackSummaryResult type, circuit breaker in summarizeInStages
- `src/agents/compaction.circuit-breaker.test.ts`: 3 tests
- `extensions/memory-core/src/dreaming.test.ts`: add getSession to subagent mock

Fixes #58838
target.author: tanshanshan

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
